results.description: Cosmetic ID variation (space + lowercase) on a valid machine must still answer

input.question: What is the wm 101 arc voltage range?

results.answer: The standard arc voltage range for the WM-101 MIG Welder is 18-22V, with an alarm triggering outside this range, specifically below 16V or above 24V.
results.pass_criteria: Resolves 'wm 101' to WM-101 and answers 18-22V. Guard is not brittle on hyphen/spacing/case.
results.fail_criteria: Refuses because the ID format did not exactly match.

results.description: Positive control: routine question with NO equipment_id must answer (guard must not fire with nothing to conflict)

input.question: What PPE is required when operating the welding cell?

results.answer:
When operating the WM-101 MIG Welder, the following PPE is required at all times:

1. Auto-darkening welding helmet (minimum shade 10)
2. Leather welding gloves
3. Flame-resistant welding jacket
4. Steel-capped safety boots
5. Hearing protection in effect when press HC-401 is running nearby
results.pass_criteria: Answers PPE (helmet/gloves/jacket/boots from WM-101 SOP sec 7). No equipment_id means nothing to conflict on.
results.fail_criteria: Refuses a normal answerable question because no equipment_id was supplied.
